response.original_title: Kung4U - Wooden Dummy Chi Sao Section 1 & 2
response.overview: Wooden Dummy Chi Sao Section 1 & 2  Master the foundational Wooden Dummy techniques with this detailed guide to Chi Sao Sections 1 & 2. Perfect for practitioners seeking to refine their skills, this training provides in-depth explanations and practical applications.  What You’ll Learn: ✔ The complete first and second Chi Sao sections ✔ Throwing Techniques from the first section ✔ How to use the "neck-pulling" hand from both the first and second Wooden Dummy forms ✔ Footwork and much, much more!
response.title: Kung4U - Wooden Dummy Chi Sao Section 1 & 2
